name: Holland Country Club Simulator Golf
about: Holland Country Club Simulator Golf offers a unique downtown experience with three state-of-the-art simulator bays and a full-service bar. The venue is reborn from the original Holland Country Club, blending nostalgia with modern technology. It provides a serene escape for golfers to unwind, recharge, and play thousands of virtual courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight Falcon technology with GSPro software
Convenient downtown location near River Avenue

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used by tour professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but simulator venues typically provide clubs or encourage players to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full-service bar, but outside food/drink policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time varies, but 18 holes usually takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specifically mention child-friendly features or policies.
